{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324005052A5D4D7D954D01AB5F6E3\"}"},"total":2325},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6903003496971321348","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书！涉及了很多书。狐妖小红娘呀，斗罗大陆呀，斗破苍穹呀。还有刺客伍六七等。剧情也非常的不错。就是章节有点少了。五星，五星。要是章节更多一点就完美了。","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":10,"text":"狐妖小红娘","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E7%8B%90%E5%A6%96%E5%B0%8F%E7%BA%A2%E5%A8%98\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742846521AB5F6E3%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226903003496971321348%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226893041150425304072%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8B%90%E5%A6%96%E5%B0%8F%E7%BA%A2%E5%A8%98%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"},{"e":21,"s":17,"text":"斗罗大陆","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%96%97%E7%BD%97%E5%A4%A7%E9%99%86\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742846521AB5F6E3%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226903003496971321348%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226893041150425304072%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%97%E7%BD%97%E5%A4%A7%E9%99%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"},{"e":36,"s":31,"text":"刺客伍六七","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%88%BA%E5%AE%A2%E4%BC%8D%E5%85%AD%E4%B8%83\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742846521AB5F6E3%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226903003496971321348%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226893041150425304072%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%88%BA%E5%AE%A2%E4%BC%8D%E5%85%AD%E4%B8%83%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1607230753,"group_id":"6893041150425304072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看什么？\n","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2qYPpSen8YOHzKZSqp3jis=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/91a3f068a88b497b8f5cac5fc76974a0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776875453\u0026x-signature=Byj3o%2FG7LX5gaCygoePA0CxXRcY%3D","user_id":"83212060606238","user_name":"太初•帝皇•尊上"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"83212060606238","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6893041150425304072","book_info":{"abstract":"唐羽，二十一世纪屌丝一个，凌晨五点打游戏时猝死，然后穿越来到了斗罗大陆，并且获得了一个系统。系统可以让唐羽不死，无论唐羽怎么浪，就是死不了，虽然没有一开始就通天的实力，可是唐羽凭借着这不死的能力，在诸天万界当中随便浪。斗罗星上，唐羽凭借蝼蚁般的实力就敢随随便便挑衅十万年魂兽和封号斗罗。斗气大陆中，斗圣又如何，反正老子不死，丫的就跟你耗上了。东胜神州中，一个耳光打在天庭老大的脸上，又一个耳光打在西天大雷音寺老大的脸上，你来打死我呀，反正咱待会就活过来了，又可以继续浪。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4192b5abcd6863af3eac0358ca99dfe7","author":"星空龙麟","author_id":"","book_id":"6893041150425304072","book_name":"诸天万界之不死阎王系统","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8654人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71
